narrative:
Precinct Monclova 2 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,223 registered voters, with 46.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.0%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
